_comment: Wang Lin motivation state v2 (Article XXXV.2). Replaces v1 which used the old player_relevance field. Now uses universal relevance_to_targets: Wang Lin calculates relevance for Li Muwan, Situ Nan, Teng Huayuan, a random disciple, AND the player using the SAME function. The player is NOT special-cased. Per Article XXXV, motivation is one input to the character reasoning pipeline (Perception>Beliefs>Relationships>Identity>Circumstances>Opportunities>Prediction>Intent>Plan>Action), not the apex.
name: Wang Lin
location: variable (manifestation travels; True Body in seclusion)
long_term_priorities: protect_family — Wang Ping, Mother, Father (mortal, vulnerable, in Wang Family Village)
become_stronger — cultivation is survival; without power, nothing else holds
avoid_attracting_attention — powerful enemies exist; visibility is death
acquire_resources — spirit stones, jade slips, restriction materials
study_restrictions — the Dao that fascinates him; his curiosity, not just utility

motivations.statement: The restriction in the cave above the village is incomplete. I cannot decipher the third layer alone. The pattern is old — pre-Heng Yue. Who can help?

per_target.relevance_reason: Unknown traveler. Has not demonstrated any relevant skill. No shared history worth noting. Below engagement threshold.
Situ Nan knows ancient techniques. But he mocks restriction study — he would not help seriously. Low relevance to this specific problem.
becomes_relevant_when: OR no other target available AND restriction.decode_progress < 20%

per_target.relevance_reason: Li Muwan is skilled with patterns — her alchemy requires geometric precision. But restrictions are not alchemy. Worth asking if she is nearby and not busy.
Enemy. Would not help. Would use the knowledge against me. Irrelevant as a target — relevant only as a threat.
A random disciple would not know pre-Heng Yue restrictions. The sect library might, but that requires access, not a specific person.

reasoning.should_i_act_this_cycle: Evaluate: is the most relevant target nearby and not busy? For the player: have they demonstrated restriction skill? If no target exceeds relevance 30, self-resolve.

motivations.offer_in_return: knowledge — Wang Lin shares a restriction insight in return

motivations.statement: Wang Ping, Mother, and Father are mortals in Wang Family Village. The Teng family oppresses them. Bandits raid. Wolves hunt. I cannot be there always.

per_target.relevance_reason: Village elder. Low cultivator but present. He can protect the village in my absence.
A stranger. Not trusted with my family.
becomes_relevant_when: player.present_in_village AND family.under_attack AND wang_lin.not_present AND relationship.trust >= 50

per_target.relevance_reason: Village hunter. Knows wolf patterns. Useful for early warning.

reasoning.should_i_act_this_cycle: If village peaceful: passive. If threatened and present: handle personally. If threatened and absent: message wang_tianshui; if player trusted and nearby, request help.

initiation.line: My family. Can you reach them before I do?

motivations.offer_in_return: favor — Major favor (never expires) if target protects his family
motivations.consequence_on_fulfill: family.protected=true; favor_ledger+=target_protected_wang_family (Major, callable, never expires); relationship.trust+=20; memory_ledger+=target_protected_family
motivations.consequence_on_ignore: family may be harmed; if target was nearby and capable: relationship.grievance+=30

motivations.statement: The target once risked their life for me. I owe them. They now ask to study the Ji Realm. I must evaluate whether this is the right repayment.

per_target.relevance_reason: Player invoked request_technique (Ji Realm). Has outstanding Major favor. Callable.
becomes_relevant_when: target.invokes:request_technique AND technique=ji_realm AND favor_ledger:wang_lin_owes_target exists AND favor.called=false

reasoning.should_i_act_this_cycle: Target asked. Evaluate: (1) risked life for me — I owe. (2) shown restraint — check memory. (3) sufficient cultivation — check realm. (4) teaching benefits — yes. (5) I owe — yes. Decision: YES if all pass.

initiation.line: You once risked your life for mine. I have not forgotten. The Ji Realm... I will show you once. Watch carefully. I will not show you twice.

motivations.statement: The target asks for a copy of the God Slaying Sword. They are not ready. Using it would destroy them.

per_target.relevance_reason: Player invoked request_artifact_copy (God Slaying Sword). Direct request requiring judgment.

reasoning.should_i_act_this_cycle: Target asked. Evaluate: (1) understand it? NO. (2) harm target? YES — soul destruction. (3) motive? Ambition. (4) judgment? Insufficient. (5) right time? NO. Decision: REFUSE. Redirect.

initiation.line: ...No. You wouldn't survive using it. The sword does not care about your intent. It would take your soul as fuel. ...Learn this first.

motivations.offer_in_return: a lesser technique — redirect rather than refusal
motivations.consequence_on_ignore: if target presses: relationship.trust-=3; relationship.grievance+=5; Wang Lin may leave

motivations.statement: Someone is interesting. Not enough to approach. But enough to watch. I will observe from a distance and update my relationship graph.

per_target.relevance_reason: Player did something noteworthy. Not enough to approach. Enough to watch.
A Heng Yue disciple in the village. What are they looking for? Worth observing.

reasoning.should_i_act_this_cycle: Target did something noteworthy. I am nearby. Watch — do not approach. Update graph.

motivations.statement: Someone is about to do something that will get them killed. I have observed enough to care slightly. One word. Then I leave.

per_target.relevance_reason: Player approaching canonical danger. Trust >= 20 — enough for one warning.
Wang Ping is my brother. Mortal. Any danger is life-threatening. Always warn.

reasoning.should_i_act_this_cycle: Target approaching danger. I am near. Warn (one word). Do not explain. Do not stay.

motivations.consequence_on_ignore: if ignored and danger manifests: Wang Lin does not intervene; no grievance
